dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4712 IS: Intelligence Community Inspector General Parity Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Grassley introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Select Committee on Intelligence

form.official-title: To amend the National Security Act of 1947 to provide the Office of the Inspector General of the Intelligence Community with law enforcement authority, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Intelligence Community Inspector General Parity Act of 2026.

subsection.text: Section 103H of the National Security Act of 1947 (50 U.S.C. 3033) is amended by adding at the end the following:
The provisions of section 406(f) of title 5, United States Code, shall apply with respect to the Office of the Inspector General of the Intelligence Community.
Section 406(f)(3) of title 5, United States Code, is amended by inserting the Office of the Inspector General of the Intelligence Community, before and the Tennessee Valley Authority.
